title: Crossings
content:
{{Top|leg}}
"'''Crossings'''" were the term given by [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]] and the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] inhabitants to their often-traumatic jumps through [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]]. The earlier Crossings were extremely hazardous and only improved as [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Sekot]] adapted to the trials of [[Lightspeed/Legends|lightspeed]] travel.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic III: Reunion]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''
